name: wendy-agentic-coding
description: Reusable Wendy CLI, wendy-agent, WendyOS, project setup, wendy.json, entitlement, device ops, MCP, app lifecycle, and device debugging workflows for Claude Code.

Setup.command: command -v wendy >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf 'Wendy CLI ready: %s\n' "$(wendy --version)" || printf 'Wendy CLI not found. Ask the assistant to run /wendy-install or say "install wendy" to set it up.\n'
